title: Prince Harry's trial against The Sun's owner can proceed, judge rules
text: LONDON (AP) — A London High Court judge on Thursday allowed Prince Harry's lawsuit against the publisher of The Sun tabloid to go to trial on claims the newspaper used unlawful methods to gather information about him, rejecting the newspaper's attempt to throw out the case.

title: Women's World Cup: U.S. faces tough test against Netherlands in repeat of 2019 final
text: The U.S. national team faces the Netherlands in the Women's World Cup Wednesday, in an eagerly-anticipated repeat of the 2019 World Cup final, which the U.S. won 2-0.

title: Best Value Stocks to Buy for July 17th
text: SOHO, MLKN and NWSA made it to the Zacks Rank #1 (Strong Buy) value stocks list on July 17, 2023.

title: 4 Stocks to Watch From a Prospering Entertainment Industry
text: Film and television production and distribution companies like NWSA, WWE, LGF.A and IMAX are benefiting from higher consumption of digital entertainment and a recovering ad spending environment.

title: The 3 Best Media Stocks to Buy for July 2023
text: The media business is in a tough spot. The continued migration of news and information online has challenged traditional news outlets ranging from newspapers and magazines to television and radio.
